creator: root@cooltrainer.org
text:
Will do. I have a local port for libresonic (Yet Another Subsonic Fork) using the new FLAVOR system along with support for the newer tomcat versions, and I'll clean that up and submit a patch for madsonic along with an update to madsonic 6.2.9084.

If I can make it generic enough I'd like to move my app container flavor logic out to a Uses/war.mk or something so multiple web app ports don't have to duplicate it and each require unique patches like this as container port versions come and go.
